description: An auditor reviews the process for approving large capital expenditures.

nodes.task_description: Select a sample of 5 major capital projects approved in the last year.

expected_outcome.expected: A sample is selected for testing.

nodes.task_description: For each project, verify that a formal business case with an ROI calculation was prepared.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor finds that one project was approved without a formal business case.

nodes.task_description: Verify that each project was approved at the correct level of management based on the project's value, as required by the delegation of authority policy.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor confirms all sampled projects had the proper level of approval.
